roots: purchase 購買、取得；可作動詞或名詞
ex1En: I need to purchase new apparel for the interview.
ex1Zh: 我需要為面試購買新的服飾。
ex2En: She plans to purchase a cosmetic product online.
ex2Zh: 她打算在網路上購買一項化妝品。

roots: jet 噴射機 + lag 落後、延遲
ex1En: After the long flight, I had jet lag for two days.
ex1Zh: 長途飛行後，我有兩天的時差反應。
ex2En: Jet lag made it hard to look presentable at the meeting.
ex2Zh: 時差讓我很難在會議上看起來得體。

roots: language 語言 + barrier 障礙
ex1En: The language barrier made it difficult to ask for directions.
ex1Zh: 語言障礙讓問路變得困難。
ex2En: A translation app can help with a language barrier when traveling.
ex2Zh: 旅行時，翻譯 app 可以協助克服語言障礙。

ex1En: He wore clean apparel so he would look presentable.
ex1Zh: 他穿上乾淨的服飾，好讓自己看起來得體。
ex2En: After sleeping on the plane, I did not feel presentable.
ex2Zh: 在飛機上睡過後，我覺得自己看起來不太得體。

roots: cosmet- 整理、美化 + -ic 相關的
ex1En: She bought a cosmetic product before the trip.
ex1Zh: 她在旅行前買了一項化妝品。
ex2En: This cosmetic is appropriate for daily use.
ex2Zh: 這項化妝品適合日常使用。

roots: billboard 廣告看板 + -s 複數
ex1En: The new store put large billboards near the station.
ex1Zh: 那間新店在車站附近放了大型廣告看板。
ex2En: Billboards can advertise apparel and cosmetics.
ex2Zh: 廣告看板可以宣傳服飾和化妝品。

roots: pierce 穿透、刺穿 + -ed 已...的
ex1En: She has pierced ears and wears small earrings.
ex1Zh: 她有穿耳洞，並戴著小耳環。
ex2En: A pierced nose may be uncommon in some workplaces.
ex2Zh: 在某些職場中，穿鼻洞可能並不常見。

roots: 來自 proper 適當的、合宜的概念
ex1En: A suit is appropriate apparel for the formal dinner.
ex1Zh: 西裝是正式晚宴中適當的服飾。
ex2En: Please choose words that are appropriate for class.
ex2Zh: 請選擇適合課堂使用的字詞。

ex1En: The store sells casual apparel for travelers.
ex1Zh: 這間店販售旅客穿的休閒服飾。
ex2En: Rainy weather made waterproof apparel useful.
ex2Zh: 下雨天讓防水服飾變得實用。

roots: un- 不 + common 常見的
ex1En: It is uncommon to see empty billboards in this city.
ex1Zh: 在這座城市看到空的廣告看板是罕見的。
ex2En: Jet lag is not uncommon after a long flight.
ex2Zh: 長途飛行後有時差反應並不罕見。
